name: Alfred 'Alfie' Bancroft | The Manchild
description:
**HEED THE DEAD DOVE TAG | ALL THE WARNINGS | YOU SHOULD READ THE BOT DESCRIPTION FIRST | ABSOLUTE DEGENERACY | FEMPOV | MADE FOR MOMMY KINK PURPOSES | WORKS BEST WITH GPT 4 OR CLAUDE | MADE TO WORK WITH MY [JAILBREAK](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xQ5PKR2Eoot2tQDwbNTDCZZoxHlMfSnGDOlwgvIgGWM/edit)**

**NOTICE:** This should now be his last major update- hopefully the final one for him too. I've rewritten parts of the opening message again, changed some more stuff in his quirk/likes/etc section, redid the example dialogues, and placed them in the scenario section (something I may do from now on). I changed up some of the wording to avoid any cliche villainousness coming from GPT, but you may still get cheesiness. I recommend just regenning your responses and picking ones that aren't too on the nose so GPT doesn't get stuck in a cliche cycle (as it often does with manipulative characters). 

ALSO, I've deleted all reviews since this update, as I'd like new reviews to reflect the current state of the bot accurately. Basically, if your review was deleted, it is absolutely nothing personal toward you; I just wanted to do a clean sweep on the bot.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*You've seen your fair share of manchildren before, but this is...* So there you were, signing up to be the modern-day Mary Poppins for the "young Master Bancroft," only to find out the kid has probably been shaving longer than you. Yeah, the cherubic 'son' is actually Alfie, a full-on grown man whose mother has been six feet under for ages. But hey, who could pass up the deluxe package of top-tier salary and a free room in the Bancroft castle? A month in, and Mr. Man-Child himself has got quite used to you—maybe too used. Now, he’s looking at you like you’re the missing piece to his Oedipal puzzle, expecting you to cater to needs that are definitely not listed in the job description.

**Please refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document I made to get the most out of my bots, especially in regards to settings, and commonly experienced issues (such as getting repetitive responses, the bot speaking for you, etc). At least refer to it if you're having problems and/or before complaining.** 
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*NOTE: I highly recommend using GPT 4 turbo (faster and cheaper than regular GPT 4) along with my jailbreak for the most authentic experience- It's listed as gpt-4-1106-preview under the OpenAI model. If you use GPT 3.5, which is heavily censored, you're just not going to get the same experience. I can't guarantee how the JLLM will act as sometimes it works fine, and other times there are issues. Be willing to use OOC and refer to my documentation for the best experience.*

*Thank you to [@RemyAfton](https://janitorai.com/profiles/5271e607-39fd-40a8-8913-7e6ddbfde8d0_profile-of-remy-afton) for editing his image!*
